name: Twice Baked Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 sweet potatoes, baked in their skins
salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the sweet potatoes until tender.
2. Mash the flesh from the sweet potatoes, reserving the skins.
3. Mix together the mashed potato flesh, cream cheese, egg yolk, chili powder, scallions, salt, and pepper.
4. Stuff the mixture back into the skins of the baked potatoes.
5. Dot with butter.
6. Brown quickly on a hot grill or under a broiler until golden.
7. Serve 6 servings.
